Home › Orange County › Winter Park › Mexican Restaurants

Mexican Restaurants in Winter Park

9 mexican restaurants in Winter Park, every one graded from its most recent Florida DBPR inspection. 6 currently hold an A, on an average 4.3-star diner rating.

9 mexican restaurants

  • A 100 L
    LAS CARRETAS MEXICAN RESTAURANT Mexican ★ 4.9 (22321) Winter Park · Orange County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 98 P
    PEPE'S CANTINA Mexican ★ 4.7 (2952) Winter Park · Orange County VeganVeg Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 98 T
    TACO BELL/PIZZA HUT Mexican ★ 3.6 (1002) Winter Park · Orange County VegHealthy Inspected Feb 2026
  • A 97 C
    CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL # 360 Mexican ★ 3.6 (2105) Winter Park · Orange County VegGF +5 more Inspected Nov 2025
  • A 96 E
    EL POTRO MEXICAN RESTAURANT Mexican ★ 4.6 (2294) Winter Park · Orange County VegGF +1 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • A 93 H
    HUNGER STREET TACOS Mexican ★ 4.4 (2066) Winter Park · Orange County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • B 87 C
    CHILI'S GRILL & BAR Mexican ★ 4 (2396) Winter Park · Orange County VegKeto +1 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • C 77 H
    HABANEROS MEXICAN GRILL Mexican ★ 4.3 (1720) Winter Park · Orange County VegGF +4 more Inspected Feb 2026
  • C 75 A
    AGAVE AZUL COCINA MEXICANA Mexican ★ 4.8 (11393) Winter Park · Orange County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected Jan 2026
